info.title: DotNetTestRadar
info.description:
Identifies high-risk .NET source files and ranks them by starting priority.
      Phase 1 cross-references git churn, code coverage, and cyclomatic complexity
      to produce a Risk Score. Phase 2 adds Roslyn-based seam analysis (unseamed
      infrastructure calls, direct instantiation, concrete constructor parameters,
      static calls) to compute a Starting Priority score — so teams know both
      where tests are needed and where they can practically begin today.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: DotNetTestRadar - Identify high-risk .NET source files and where to start testing today

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Analyze .NET solution for high-risk files and starting priority

options.name: --solution
options.description: Path to a .sln or .slnx file

options.name: --coverage
options.description: Path to a Cobertura XML coverage file

options.name: --since
options.description: Limit git history to commits after this date (ISO format)

options.name: --top
options.description: Number of top files to display [default: 20]

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Glob pattern(s) to exclude files. Repeatable.

options.name: --output
options.description: Export results to a JSON or CSV file

options.name: --baseline
options.description: Path to a previous JSON export to compare against

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable colored output [default: False]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format for stdout: table, json, or csv [default: table]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show detailed intermediate scores for each file [default: False]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress all output except errors (exit code only) [default: False]

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Run dotnet test, collect code coverage, and analyze the solution in one step

options.name: --solution
options.description: Path to a .sln or .slnx file

options.name: --tests-dir
options.description: Directory or project file to run tests from. Defaults to the solution file, which runs all test projects in the solution.

options.name: --since
options.description: Limit git history to commits after this date (ISO format)

options.name: --top
options.description: Number of top files to display [default: 20]

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Glob pattern(s) to exclude files. Repeatable.

options.name: --output
options.description: Export results to a JSON or CSV file

options.name: --baseline
options.description: Path to a previous JSON export to compare against

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Disable colored output [default: False]

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format for stdout: table, json, or csv [default: table]

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Show detailed intermediate scores for each file [default: False]

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Suppress all output except errors (exit code only) [default: False]

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Maximum time in minutes to wait for dotnet test to complete (default: 10) [default: 10]

options.name: --coverage-tool
options.description: Tool for collecting code coverage: coverlet (default) or dotnet-coverage [default: coverlet]
